reviews.review_description: Not worth a dollar, terrible resolution. It's supposed to be relaxing but you're walking around at 5 meter height.

You literally see a guys walking around the beach holding a 360 camera on a tall boom when you look down. Hope you’re not wearing a skirt. So much for standing in the water or sand. You’re hovering above it like 10 feet. And there are tourists staring at you and doing stuff all around you. Not very relaxing.

reviews.review_title: Paradise must be quite a quiet place
reviews.review_description: Just be there, visually, mentally. Relaxing! VR makes it possible.
